summary: A talking-and-text clip arguing that activists and a vice mayor are inciting violence and doxxing against ICE officers. It intercuts screenshots of a doxxing website ('icelist.info'), TikTok screen-recordings of activists, and a talking-head of ICE Acting Director Todd Lyons speaking at a podium. It is dominated by a long spoken statement, not a music-driven cinematic montage, so it is out of scope despite the defensive messaging.
notable_text: Vice Mayor of the City of Cudahy, CA, Cynthia Gonzalez, calls for local gangs to unite against ICE; TikToker posts a video about murdering ICE agents; icelist.info; Security Specialist ICE; Identified, Role Identified, Texas
